title: Destination: Skellige
desc: Geralt travels from Novigrad to the Skellige Isles in search of Ciri. To reach the islands he must hire a ship and deal with pirates during the voyage. After arriving in Skellige, Geralt attends King Bran's funeral and begins investigating Ciri's presence in the region.

title: The King is Dead – Long Live the King
desc: Geralt attends the wake of King Bran at Kaer Trolde and reunites with Yennefer. During the feast the two sneak into Ermion's laboratory to investigate a magical artifact connected to Ciri.

title: Echoes of the Past
short_desc: Part of the investigation into Ciri's activities in Skellige.
desc: Geralt and Yennefer travel to the druid grove to investigate the magical explosion caused by Ciri. Using necromancy, Yennefer attempts to reconstruct past events while Geralt protects her from danger.

title: Nameless
desc: Geralt searches the sacred garden of Freya on Hindarsfjall to find clues about Ciri. Investigating the destruction left behind by the Wild Hunt reveals how Ciri escaped their pursuit.

title: The Last Wish
short_desc: Requires completing several Skellige main quests.
desc: Yennefer asks Geralt to help capture a djinn so she can break the magical bond created by Geralt's last wish. The quest determines whether Geralt and Yennefer stay together.

title: The Lord of Undvik
short_desc: Available after meeting Crach an Craite.
desc: Geralt travels to the island of Undvik to find Hjalmar an Craite and help him defeat the ice giant terrorizing the island.

title: Possession
short_desc: Cerys asks Geralt to investigate a cursed jarl.
desc: Geralt investigates strange behavior from Udalryk and discovers a hym feeding on his guilt. The witcher must find a way to defeat the spirit.

title: King's Gambit
short_desc: Requires completing 'Possession' or 'The Lord of Undvik'.
desc: Geralt investigates a massacre during the feast where Skellige's new ruler is to be chosen. The investigation uncovers a political conspiracy.

title: Coronation
short_desc: Final quest of the Skellige ruler storyline.
desc: Depending on Geralt's choices, either Cerys or Hjalmar becomes ruler of Skellige and Geralt attends the coronation ceremony.

title: In the Heart of the Woods
short_desc: Started from a notice board in Fayrlund.
desc: Geralt investigates killings in a nearby forest and discovers a powerful leshen worshipped by villagers.

title: The Path of Warriors
short_desc: Trial of strength in Skellige tradition.
desc: Geralt climbs a dangerous mountain path used in Skellige warrior trials while fighting harpies and surviving harsh conditions.

title: Fists of Fury: Skellige
short_desc: Part of the fistfighting quest chain.
desc: Geralt challenges several fighters across the Skellige Isles to become the regional champion of bare-knuckle combat.

title: Contract: Skellige's Most Wanted
short_desc: A witcher contract involving several monsters.
desc: Geralt investigates reports of a dangerous monster only to discover a group of intelligent creatures plotting revenge against witchers.

title: From a Land Far, Far Away
short_desc: Started by finding a mysterious journal.
desc: Geralt finds a wrecked ship and a journal describing a journey from a distant land. Following the clues reveals the fate of the expedition.

title: Scavenger Hunt: Bear School Gear
short_desc: Triggered by finding Bear School diagrams.
desc: Geralt follows clues to locate diagrams of the legendary Bear School witcher equipment hidden across Skellige.
